title_i18n.en: Profile / Avatar - Professional Identity Portrait Wallpaper

description: Generates a high-resolution, premium wallpaper featuring a subject in professional attire with career-related activities and typography.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 生成高分辨率专业壁纸，展示职业着装的主体人物及其职业相关活动和文字排版。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 生成高解析度專業桌布，展示職業著裝的主體人物及其職業相關活動和文字排版。
description_i18n.ja: プロフェッショナルな服装の人物とキャリア関連の活動、タイポグラフィを組み合わせた高解像度のプレミアム壁紙を生成します。
description_i18n.ko: 전문 복장을 착용한 인물과 직업 관련 활동 및 타이포그래피가 포함된 고해상도 프리미엄 배경화면을 생성합니다.
description_i18n.de: Erstellt ein hochauflösendes Premium-Hintergrundbild mit einer Person in professioneller Kleidung, berufsbezogenen Aktivitäten und Typografie.
description_i18n.fr: Génère un fond d'écran premium haute résolution mettant en scène un sujet en tenue professionnelle avec des activités liées à la carrière et de la typographie.
description_i18n.ru: Создает премиальные обои высокого разрешения с изображением человека в деловой одежде, профессиональной деятельностью и типографикой.
description_i18n.es: Genera un fondo de pantalla premium de alta resolución con un sujeto en vestimenta profesional, actividades relacionadas con su carrera y tipografía.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Gera um papel de parede premium em alta resolução com uma pessoa em traje profissional, atividades relacionadas à carreira e tipografia.
description_i18n.it: Genera uno sfondo premium ad alta risoluzione con un soggetto in abbigliamento professionale, attività legate alla carriera e tipografia.
description_i18n.vi: Tạo hình nền cao cấp độ phân giải cao với chủ thể trong trang phục chuyên nghiệp, hoạt động liên quan đến nghề nghiệp và typography.
description_i18n.pl: Generuje wysokiej rozdzielczości, premium tapetę prezentującą postać w profesjonalnym stroju z działaniami związanymi z karierą i typografią.
description_i18n.id: Menghasilkan wallpaper premium beresolusi tinggi yang menampilkan subjek dalam pakaian profesional dengan aktivitas terkait karier dan tipografi.
description_i18n.nl: Genereert een hoogwaardige premium achtergrond met een persoon in professionele kleding, carrièregerelateerde activiteiten en typografie.
description_i18n.ar: ينشئ خلفية متميزة عالية الدقة تعرض شخصًا بزي احترافي مع أنشطة مهنية وطباعة.
description_i18n.tr: Profesyonel kıyafetler içinde bir kişi, kariyer ile ilgili aktiviteler ve tipografi içeren yüksek çözünürlüklü premium duvar kağıdı oluşturur.
description_i18n.uk: Генерує високоякісні шпалери високої роздільної здатності з зображенням людини в діловому одязі, професійною діяльністю та типографікою.
description_i18n.en: Generates a high-resolution, premium wallpaper featuring a subject in professional attire with career-related activities and typography.

query.en: Create a portrait size wallpaper of pride in carrying out the profession as an ({argument name="name" default="ALINA"}), in the wallpaper contains a photo of the attached subject wearing a uniform or things related to the profession, make a pose, the subject's expression looks happy, don't have the same expression as the attached photo, give the wallpaper ornaments, decorations related to the profession, add several activities related to the profession arranged neatly, precisely, harmoniously, the typography says "I am ({argument name="job title" default="ALINA FASHION TEACHER"}) "above the subject's head, the font adjusts to the subject's job, each part of the wallpaper must be neat, the wallpaper visuals should not look monotonous, should not look stiff, must be original style wallpaper cinematic resolution 8K coloring, grading, wallpaper effects must look premium. Face and body exactly same as uploaded image.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Create a portrait size wallpaper of pride in carrying out the profession as an ({argument name="name" default="ALINA"}), in the wallpaper contains a photo of the attached subject wearing a uniform or things related to the profession, make a pose, the subject's expression looks happy, don't have the same expression as the attached photo, give the wallpaper ornaments, decorations related to the profession, add several activities related to the profession arranged neatly, precisely, harmoniously, the typography says "I am ({argument name="job title" default="ALINA FASHION TEACHER"}) "above the subject's head, the font adjusts to the subject's job, each part of the wallpaper must be neat, the wallpaper visuals should not look monotonous, should not look stiff, must be original style wallpaper cinematic resolution 8K coloring, grading, wallpaper effects must look premium. Face and body exactly same as uploaded image.
